content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch diff against `origin/master` and read the added adapter tests alongside the relevant `br`/`bv` implementation files. I did not find any in-scope correctness, safety, or robustness issues in the new test coverage. Verification performed: `cargo test --test unit` passed, targeted `cargo test --test unit br_adapter_test` and `cargo test --test unit bv_adapter_test` passed, and `cargo fmt --check` passed. `cargo clippy --test unit -- -D warnings` currently fails on a pre-existing issue in `tests/unit/process_backend_test.rs:2891`, which is outside this diff.

## Amendments

None.
